title: bauhinia dumosa var. viscidula
intro: Bauhinia dumosa var. viscidula, also known as the dwarf white orchid tree, is a variant of the Bauhinia dumosa species, a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, where its leaves and stems are used to treat various health conditions due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia dumosa var. viscidula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Bauhinia dumosa var. viscidula include infusions and decoctions of its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
